executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a Next.js 14 App Router SPA. The store page at /toko/[storeId] uses internal view state (setView) not URL routing. Views: home (product grid), cart, checkout, success, orders. All navigation between these views is via button clicks, not page navigations. Testing the /toko/[storeId] route needs an actual store_id that exists in Supabase - if no test data exists, skip store tests and only test the landing page at /. The landing page at / is standalone and should be testable.
